ModMetaData.name: Alpha Vehicles - Early Flight
ModMetaData.author: Sarg
ModMetaData.description:
Adds 8 planes from 1903 to 1920. <size=24>Issues</size>
No issues tracked
<size=24>Plans for the future</size>
More vehicles? Maybe!
<size=24>Credit</size>
https://sketchfab.com/3d-models/1903-wright-flyer-c91467735c6743af872e65107a79beda https://sketchfab.com/3d-models/sopwith-camel-70ad9a87976e4d4eaeedaa4cd78dc94b https://sketchfab.com/3d-models/weiss-6d8ab3cc743b492e8d9fbe88dd7886cd https://sketchfab.com/3d-models/handley-page-type-o-779b944693164deb9ad2e14426290027 https://sketchfab.com/3d-models/biplane-avro-504-d420696b807442d986a64c652cc4de76 https://sketchfab.com/3d-models/bleriot-xi-file-9bc9803d7f6b410ea1277595db6d53c8 https://sketchfab.com/3d-models/cierva-c30-6b1714f46f21467492ad8a295123abc0 https://sketchfab.com/3d-models/albatros-bii-325c804ba7a34740987d111ebd90fb54
https://www.soundsofchanges.eu/sound/ford-model-t-tin-lizzy-starting-the-engine-2/#
<size=24>Compatibility</size>
Should be compatible with any vehicle mods out there
